errors.app-already-initialized: By Merlin's beard! This realm has already been conjured!
errors.app-not-initialized: Hold your horses, adventurer! We haven't even set up camp yet!
errors.network-error: The ethereal network is tangled! Unable to send carrier pigeons!
errors.password-too-short: Your secret phrase must be longer to keep the dragons at bay!
errors.unknown-error: We've stumbled into uncharted territory! An unknown enigma has occurred!

alerts.app-initialization-success: Huzzah! The scrolls have unfurled and the magic is alive! Your journey through the mystical realm begins!
